meanings.definition: place so as to be noticed
examples: post a warning at the dump

meanings.definition: put up with something or somebody unpleasant
examples: I cannot bear his constant criticism
The new secretary had to endure a lot of unprofessional remarks
he learned to tolerate the heat
She stuck out two years in a miserable marriage

meanings.definition: make available for sale at an auction
examples: The dealer put up three of his most valuable paintings for auction

meanings.definition: preserve in a can or tin
examples: tinned foods are not very tasty
The immigrants were housed in a new development outside the town
The city has to put up half the required amount

meanings.definition: propose as a candidate for some honor
